AboutWeddingSection.info: August 23, 2025 at 4:30 PM at Renascença Space, Brasília, DF.

Countdown.closeTimeMessage: Just a few days until our 'yes'.
Countdown.timeArrivedMessage: The big day is here – time to start our 'happily ever after'
Countdown.passedTimeMessage: The big day has passed, but our love story is just beginning.
Countdown.longTimeMessage: The countdown has begun! Soon we'll be together for our big moment.

LastInfoSection.confirmYouPresence: Don't forget to confirm your presence! Send a message to our wedding planner on WhatsApp.

OurStorySection.paragraph1: Even though we followed similar paths, it was only outside Brasília that our worlds truly met. We both studied Software Engineering at UnB, but we only met during a trip with friends to São Paulo in December 2021. Shortly after, on February 12, 2022, we started dating.
OurStorySection.paragraph2: Soon after, Gabriela moved to São Paulo for work, and we experienced a long-distance relationship filled with longing and special reunions. In February 2023, Gabriel moved there too, and we finally began our life together.
OurStorySection.paragraph3: That's when Bernadete joined the story — our little dachshund who became the joy of our home. In June 2024 came the proposal, and now we're counting down the days to our big day: August 23, 2025.

RsvpPage.yourPresenceIsImportant:
Your presence is very important to us!
To confirm, please send a message to our wedding planner on WhatsApp.
RsvpPage.countOnYou: We’re counting on you to make this day even more special!

GiftPage.paragraph: Your presence is the greatest gift we could ask for! But if you'd like to give us something, we’d be very happy! We created a gift list at Camicado. We also welcome cash gifts, which we’ll use for our honeymoon! To send a PIX, use the QR Code below:
